Session Chat

Protecting Creativity.
Empowering Artists.

Fortis Music is an AI + Blockchain platform built to give independent artists the tools they deserve — rights protection, fair monetization, and direct fan connection. No label needed.

Our Story — Coming Soon

Zoran and Sava will introduce
Fortis Music and the vision behind it.

The Team
ZJ
Zoran Jovanovic
CEO & Founder
Vision, strategy, fundraising and partnerships. Building Fortis Music from the ground up to become the global shield of creative rights.
SD
Sava Devic
CMO & Creative Lead
Design, brand identity and marketing. Crafting the visual language and creative direction of Fortis Music.
Our Mission

The music industry is broken for creators.

Independent artists make up nearly 47% of the global music market — yet they receive the smallest share of revenue, have no reliable way to protect their rights, and rely on intermediaries who capture most of the value. Fortis Music exists to change that. We are building the infrastructure that gives every artist — regardless of size or label — the tools to own what they create, get paid fairly, and connect directly with the fans who support them.

Our Values

Protection First

Every track registered on Fortis is cryptographically fingerprinted and timestamped on blockchain — immediately and permanently.

Fair Monetization

Artists keep the majority of what they earn. No hidden fees, no opaque splits. Transparent payouts directly to creators.

Real Fan Connection

Direct tipping, exclusive drops, listening rooms — tools that build genuine relationships between artists and the people who love their music.

Built for Everyone

From Dubai to Belgrade, from bedroom producers to established DJs — Fortis is designed for the global independent music community.

Be Part of the Beginning.

Fortis Music is in private beta. Register now and help shape the future of music rights.

Protect Your Music

Upload your track to generate a cryptographic fingerprint, blockchain timestamp,
and an official Fortis Protection Certificate.

Artist Information

Track Information

Audio File

↑

Click to upload or drag & drop

MP3 · WAV · FLAC · AAC  —  max 200MB

File loaded:
Protection Process
1
File Analysis — Reading audio fingerprint
2
SHA-256 Hash — Generating unique cryptographic ID
3
Blockchain Registration — Anchoring to distributed ledger
4
Certificate Issued — Fortis Protection Certificate ready
SHA-256 Hash
REST API v1.0

Protection API

Integrate Fortis fingerprint detection into any platform. Detect unauthorized uploads in real time before they go live.

Biometric-Gated API
Every upload to partner platforms requires biometric verification (Face ID / Fingerprint) via Fortis Auth before processing.
Base URL
https://api.fortismusic.com/v1
POST /fingerprint/register Register new track 
curl -X POST https://api.fortismusic.com/v1/fingerprint/register \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -H "X-Biometric-Token: WEBAUTHN_ASSERTION" \
  -F "[email protected]" \
  -F "artist_id=your_artist_uuid"
Response
{
  "status": "registered",
  "fingerprint_id": "fp_a3f8c2d1e9b7",
  "sha256": "aa424158b120709b9fc281...",
  "blockchain_tx": "0x7f3a9c...",
  "protection_level": "FULL",
  "biometric_verified": true
}
POST /fingerprint/match Detect before upload

Platforms call this endpoint before allowing an upload to go live. If match is found and uploader is not biometric-verified owner → upload is blocked.

curl -X POST https://api.fortismusic.com/v1/fingerprint/match \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer PLATFORM_API_KEY" \
  -F "audio=@upload_candidate.mp3"
Response — Match Found
{
  "match": true,
  "confidence": 0.98,
  "rights_holder": "Luna Rivera",
  "action": "BLOCK_UPLOAD",
  "reason": "Unverified uploader. Biometric auth required."
}
POST /auth/biometric/verify WebAuthn gate

Verifies a WebAuthn assertion from the user's device (Face ID / Touch ID). Returns short-lived token valid for one upload session.

{
  "assertion": "<WebAuthn assertion object>",
  "artist_id": "uuid",
  "scope": "upload_once"
}
Webhook infringement.detected Real-time alerts

Fortis sends a POST to your webhook URL when an unauthorized upload attempt is detected on any integrated platform.

{
  "event": "infringement.detected",
  "platform": "youtube",
  "timestamp": "2026-03-08T14:32:00Z",
  "matched_track": "fp_a3f8c2d1e9b7",
  "rights_holder": "Luna Rivera",
  "action_taken": "BLOCKED"
}
